backend/main.mo: Main actor defining BlogPost and Comment types with CRUD operations for blog posts, comment management (addComment, getComments), and blob storage integration via MixinStorage.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old blog posts with imageUrl strings to new format with ExternalBlob images and empty comment lists.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: comment section on blog post detail pages and image upload capability for blog post creation/editing.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and configuration with details on routing, styling, blog functionality, and remedy pages.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with OKLCH color system defining natural earth tone variables for light and dark modes including background, foreground, primary, and accent colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the AyurGlow Secrets application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with all routes (home, about, categories, subcategories, blog, admin, legal) and QueryClient provider with Layout wrapper.
frontend/src/components/BlogSidebar.tsx: Sidebar component for blog pages featuring remedy search with SearchBar/SearchResults, popular posts list with images, and category counts display.
frontend/src/components/CommentSection.t: Displays and manages comments for blog posts with a form to add new comments, including author name, content, and timestamp formatting. Uses React Query hooks for fetching and adding comments.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedPost.tsx: Renders a large featured blog post card with image, title, excerpt, category badge, and metadata (date, read time). Includes hover effects and links to the full post.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with four columns: about section, quick links, categories, and newsletter signup with social media icons. Includes copyright and app identifier for analytics.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper component that renders Navigation, children content, and Footer in a flex column structure with cream background.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with logo, main nav links, categories dropdown, admin link, and mobile hamburger menu. Highlights active routes and includes sticky positioning.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Blog post card component displaying thumbnail image, category badge, title, excerpt, and metadata (date, read time). Features hover effects and links to individual posts.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Search input component with icon, clear button, and keyboard navigation support (Enter, Escape, ArrowDown). Accepts callbacks for various user interactions.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Dropdown search results component with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter, Escape) that displays remedy pages matching the search query. Handles result selection and navigation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous actor for backend communication, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes based on Internet Identity authentication state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient configuration with delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for blog post CRUD operations (get all/published/single posts, create, update, delete) and comment management, with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemedySearch.ts: Custom hook providing search functionality for Ayurvedic remedy pages, filtering by title, category, and keywords across health remedies, skin care, and hair care categories.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom Ayurvedic-themed color palette (earth tones, sage green, warm brown, cream, gold) for both light and dark modes, plus typography settings using Inter and Playfair Display fonts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page component describing AyurGlow Secrets' mission, philosophy, and offerings with hero section and content cards featuring Ayurvedic wellness information.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPostsPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page for managing blog posts with list view, delete confirmation dialog, and navigation to create/edit post pages. Uses useGetAllPosts and useDeletePost hooks with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPage.tsx: Public blog listing page displaying published posts in a grid layout with sidebar. Uses useGetPublishedPosts hook and renders PostCard components with loading and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPostDetailPage.ts: Individual blog post detail page showing full post content with featured image, metadata, sidebar, and comment section. Fetches post by slug from published posts and handles not-found cases.
frontend/src/pages/CreateBlogPostPage.ts: Form page for creating new blog posts with rich text editor (ReactQuill), image upload with preview, category selection, and publish toggle. Handles image validation, slug generation, and uses useCreatePost mutation.
frontend/src/pages/EditBlogPostPage.tsx: Form page for editing existing blog posts, pre-populating fields from useGetPost hook. Supports updating all post fields including replacing or removing images, with similar functionality to CreateBlogPostPage.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/DandruffSca: React page component displaying dandruff and scalp care remedies with hero section, back navigation, and cards showing 4 natural treatments (neem-tea tree, lemon-yogurt, fenugreek-curd, aloe vera-coconut) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/GreyHairSol: React page component for grey hair solutions featuring 4 Ayurvedic remedies (curry leaves-coconut oil, amla-henna, black tea-coffee rinse, bhringraj-brahmi) with detailed ingredients, application instructions, benefits, and usage frequency for preventing and reversing premature greying.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairFallTre: React page component presenting hair fall treatment remedies including onion juice, fenugreek seeds, amla-shikakai, and curry leaves-coconut oil treatments, each with complete ingredient lists, step-by-step application, benefits, and recommended frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairGrowthP: React page component showcasing 4 hair growth remedies (castor-coconut oil blend, aloe vera-bhringraj, egg-yogurt protein, hibiscus-curry leaves) with detailed preparation and application instructions, benefits for stimulating hair growth, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/OilsMasksPa: React page component displaying 5 hair oil and mask treatments including Ayurvedic hot oil, brahmi-amla oil, banana-avocado mask, hibiscus-fenugreek mask, and neem-tulsi scalp oil with comprehensive ingredients, application methods, benefits, and frequency recommendations.
frontend/src/pages/HairCarePage.tsx: Landing page for hair care category displaying subcategories (hair fall, growth, dandruff, grey hair, oils/masks) as clickable cards with icons and descriptions. Features hero section with category introduction.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diabe: React component displaying Ayurvedic remedies for diabetes and blood pressure management, including fenugreek water, bitter gourd juice, cinnamon-honey tonic, and garlic-lemon remedy with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.

Alternative React component for diabetes and blood pressure support remedies using Card UI components, featuring fenugreek seeds water, bitter gourd juice, cinnamon tea, and garlic-ginger remedy with preparation instructions and health benefits.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diges: React page component for digestive and gut health remedies including Triphala churna, ginger-lemon tonic, ajwain water, and buttermilk with cumin, presented in Card UI format with preparation steps and Ayurvedic benefits.

React component displaying digestive health remedies with Triphala powder, ginger-lemon tonic, CCF tea, and ajwain water, featuring icons, ingredients, application instructions, and benefits for improving digestive fire (Agni).
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Immun: React page component displaying immunity-boosting Ayurvedic remedies including Golden Turmeric Milk, Amla Juice, Tulsi Tea, and Chyawanprash with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and usage instructions.

React page component presenting immunity-boosting Ayurvedic remedies including turmeric golden milk, tulsi-ginger tea, Chyawanprash tonic, and amla-honey shot with detailed preparation methods and immune system benefits.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Stres: React page component presenting stress relief and sleep remedies like Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Brahmi-Tulsi Tea, Chamomile-Lavender Blend, and Almond-Saffron Milk with detailed application instructions and benefits.

React page component with a hero section and cards displaying stress and sleep solutions including Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Brahmi Tea, Chamomile-Lavender Infusion, and Warm Almond Milk with Saffron, featuring back navigation to health remedies.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Weigh: React page component showcasing weight management remedies such as Lemon-Honey Water, Triphala-Guggul Formula, Ginger-Green Tea, and Cabbage-Carrot Detox Juice with metabolism-boosting benefits and frequency guidelines.
frontend/src/pages/HealthRemediesPage.ts: Landing page for Health Remedies category displaying five subcategories (Immunity Boosting, Digestion & Gut Health, Weight Management, Diabetes & BP Support, Stress & Sleep Solutions) in a grid layout with hero section and navigation cards.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main homepage component featuring a hero banner, featured post section, recent posts grid (up to 6 posts), and category exploration section. Fetches published posts using useGetPublishedPosts hook and handles loading/empty states.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Privacy policy page displaying information collection practices, data usage, cookies, third-party services, and user rights in a card-based layout with hero section and back navigation.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcnePimples: React page component for acne and pimple treatments featuring Neem-Turmeric Face Pack, Tea Tree Oil Spot Treatment, Sandalwood-Rose Water Paste, and Aloe Vera-Lemon Gel with application methods and skin benefits.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcneTreatme: Displays four Ayurvedic acne treatment remedies (neem-turmeric, tea tree-aloe, sandalwood-rosewater, cinnamon-honey) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency for each remedy.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AntiAgingPa: Presents four anti-aging Ayurvedic remedies (almond-saffron serum, avocado-honey mask, rose water-glycerin tonic, papaya-yogurt mask) with detailed ingredients, application instructions, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/DIYFacePack: Lists five DIY face pack recipes tailored to different skin types (multani mitti, besan-turmeric, oatmeal-honey, sandalwood-rose, banana-honey) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and recommended frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/NaturalGlow: Showcases four natural glow remedies (turmeric-yogurt mask, saffron-milk treatment, aloe vera-rose water toner, papaya-honey mask) with ingredients, application methods, benefits, and usage frequency for radiant skin.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/Pigmentatio: Displays four remedies for treating pigmentation and dark spots (lemon-honey mask, potato-cucumber juice, almond-milk cream, orange peel-yogurt pack) with detailed ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency recommendations.
React component displaying Ayurvedic remedies for pigmentation reduction, including four natural treatments with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/SkinCarePage.tsx: Landing page for Skin Care category showcasing five subcategories (Natural Glow, Acne & Pimples, Pigmentation & Dark Spots, Anti-Aging, DIY Face Packs) with icons, descriptions, and navigation links in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/pages/TermsOfServicePage.ts: Terms of Service page with medical disclaimer alert and sections covering agreement to terms, website use, intellectual property, and user responsibilities in a structured card layout.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including HSL-based color variables, custom colors (earth-green, sage-green, gold), typography settings, and animation keyframes for accordions.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking a blog platform with health/skin/hair care sections, existing features for comments and image uploads, and pending feature requests for backend data model updates.
